headline: Pence 🤡 SLAMS 💥 Trump’s J6 🍆 Compensation 💰 Fund as DEEPLY OFFENSIVE 😤
text: Ex-Veep Mike Pence 🧔‍♂️🧊 just SLAYED 🔪 Trump’s $1.8BN 💸 anti-weaponisation slush fund 🏦 as “DEEPLY OFFENSIVE” 😱 and straight-up “bad idea from the start” 🗑️. Pence, who hid 🫣 from the Jan 6 rioters 🧨 when they tried to HANG MIKE PENCE, said paying those who vandalised the Capitol 🏛️ and assaulted cops 👮‍♂️ is a total 🤡 show. The “lawfare victims” fund was born from Trump’s IRS beef 🤼‍♂️ beef, pardoned the J6 crew 🃏 on Day 1, and now rioters wanna cash in 💵. Pence told NBC 🎙️: “Most Republicans & Americans agree, this stinks” 🤢. Dems & GOP lawmakers 😡 both pressed Acting AG Todd Blanche 🧑‍⚖️ for details, and a federal judge just HIT PAUSE ⏸️ till June 12. Senate bigwigs like John Thune 🐘, Mitch McConnell 🐢, and Thom Tillis called it “stupid on stilts” 🤡🎪 while Tuberville 🏈 still simps for the “patriotic Americans behind bars” 🙏. Meanwhile, the DoJ is “extremely confident” 🧠💪 the fund will survive, promising “restitution for millions” 🤑. Pence says DROP IT like it’s hot 🔥—and most of America agrees! 🇺🇸🙅‍♂️
